Why does `ALIGN ANIMAL.BEE CONST.PHI` require capabilities ['CAP.SWARM_COORDINATION']?

The rule `ALIGN(ANIMAL.BEE, CONST.PHI)` → CAP.HEX_OPTIMIZATION has a guard requiring capabilities: CAP.SWARM_COORDINATION.

**Why:** phi-aligned packing uplifts hex efficiency

Guards prevent rule application when the subject entity lacks the necessary capabilities. You can satisfy guards by ensuring the entity has the required capabilities in its `capabilities` array, or by passing `--have CAP.SWARM_COORDINATION` to the CLI.
